response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of strong full-stack and systems engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and multi-language fluency, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, dedicated production GenAI experience is limited to roughly one year, falling well short of the 8+ years building AI-driven solutions required. Cloud breadth (AWS only), no explicit RAG/vector database or multi-agent framework experience listed, and no demonstrated customer-facing technical discovery leadership make this a borderline fit worth a screening call to probe depth of recent AI work.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and production systems at scale (Sociomantic handling millions of req/s)
Current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership via workshops, talks, courses, and founding GISCollective — relevant to customer-facing mentorship
concerns: Only ~1 year of dedicated GenAI/agentic work versus the 8+ years required for production AI solutions
No explicit experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI)
Cloud experience appears limited to AWS CDK; no evidence of GCP/Azure or large-scale AI system design on cloud platforms

key_factors.factor: Insufficient years of production AI experience
Current MCP and agentic-workflow work at re:cinq
